company.name: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd.
company.subtitle: Largest Indian pharma. FY25 (Mar25) revenue INR 525B / ~$6.3B. Specialty $1.04B led by Ilumya (tildrakizumab) ~$610M growing. Global Generics ex-specialty ~$5.3B: India $1.96B (#1 IPM), US $2.0B, Emerging Markets $1.07B, Western Europe + RoW $0.88B. Net cash ~$1.7B. Deuruxolitinib (Leqselvi alopecia areata) FDA-approved Jul 2024 but US launch delayed by Concert/Incyte injunction.

assets.name: Ilumya (tildrakizumab) - anti-IL-23p19 mAb (Sun-developed via SCH-2017 ex-Merck)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Ilumya ~10% IL-23 class share (vs Skyrizi, Tremfya, Stelara)

indications.name: Chronic dry eye disease (Cequa nanomicellar formulation)

assets.name: Winlevi (clascoterone 1%) - first topical androgen-receptor antagonist for acne (acquired from Cassiopea)
Levulan Kerastick + BLU-U (5-ALA photodynamic therapy) - actinic keratosis
Sun India formulations franchise (#1 IPM, INR 163B / $1.96B)
Sun Western Europe + RoW + API franchise
Leqselvi (deuruxolitinib) - oral selective TYK2/JAK1 inhibitor (acquired via Concert 2023)
assets.stage: FDA-approved Jul 2024; US launch delayed by Concert/Incyte patent injunction (resolution 2026)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Leqselvi vs Olumiant + Litfulo class (severe AA)

indications.name: Locally advanced fully-resectable stage IIIb-c melanoma (neoadjuvant intratumoral)

company_slice_sources.us.reachPct: Niche localized melanoma neoadjuvant ~20% of stage III

catalysts.title: Ilumya psoriatic arthritis sBLA filing/approval (Ph3 INSPIRE)
